3196110.name: Randall the Grape Jelly Cube goes to Soda Valley for some reason
3196110.description:
Randall the Grape Jelly Cube looking thing is going on a quest in Soda Valley to take revenge on the monsters that lurk in the valley (or maybe he is just really bored; no one really knows for sure). Kick your way through one giant valley with different areas to explore, different collectibles to pick up, and a few secrets to discover.

Game Features

  • Complex movement mechanics that allow the player to flow through levels once mastered

  • A giant level with secret areas and a total of 12 collectible crystals to find

  • A castle dungeon area that has a boss fight at the end

  • A cartoony aesthetic with cel-shading and outlines

  • 5 unique music tracks, one of which contains live instruments.
